statement: In every magma, Equation 1802 (`x = (y * z) * ((z * w) * y)`) implies Equation 1373 (`x = y * (((z * y) * y) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0334
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op z w) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z y) y) w))
